channel.title: Discover - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: Trending content from your personal network

item.author: Hacker News Top 100 Bot (Unofficial) (@hn100.bsky.social)

Reimplementing pf as an eBPF/XDP dataplane on Linux

Discussion

item.title: #🔖世の中 住民組織に行政サービス委託 地域交通や高齢者見守り、政府拡大促す - 日本経済新聞 政府は「地域運営組織…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖世の中
住民組織に行政サービス委託　地域交通や高齢者見守り、政府拡大促す - 日本経済新聞

政府は「地域運営組織」とよぶ住民組織を通じて、過疎地で地方自治体が担ってきた一部のサービスの民間への委託を進める。交付税などを通じて費用を助成する。地域運営組織は交通手段の確保や高齢者らへの見守りに取り組む。総務省が中心となり地域運営組織、RMO（Region Management Organization）の活動や設立を支援す...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖世の中
住民組織に行政サービス委託　地域交通や高齢者見守り、政府拡大促す - 日本経済新聞

政府は「地域運営組織」とよぶ住民組織を通じて、過疎地で地方自治体が担ってきた一部のサービスの民間への委託を進める。交付税などを通じて費用を助成する。地域運営組織は交通手段の確保や高齢者らへの見守りに取り組む。総務省が中心となり地域運営組織、RMO（Region Management Organization）の活動や設立を支援す...

item.title: After a months-long occupation, Minnesota is still recoverin…
item.author: Governor Tim Walz (@governorwalz.mn.gov)
item.description:
After a months-long occupation, Minnesota is still recovering from a retribution campaign waged by the federal government.

Now, Minnesota stands with Houston in demanding accountability for the fatal shooting of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo. This bloodshed cannot be normalized.
item.content:encoded:
After a months-long occupation, Minnesota is still recovering from a retribution campaign waged by the federal government.

Now, Minnesota stands with Houston in demanding accountability for the fatal shooting of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo. This bloodshed cannot be normalized.

item.title: You're going to get left behind if you don't use Al." Leave…
item.author: Jon of The North (@krauza.bsky.social)
item.description:
You're going to get left behind if you don't use Al."

Leave me then. Leave me with my critical thinking skills, my ability to read and write long- form, and books without needing Al summaries.
item.content:encoded:
You're going to get left behind if you don't use Al."

Leave me then. Leave me with my critical thinking skills, my ability to read and write long- form, and books without needing Al summaries.

item.title: Chicken piccata is an Italian-American staple beloved for it…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Chicken piccata is an Italian-American staple beloved for its piquant flavors cradled in a silky, butter-rich pan sauce. It also doesn’t hurt that it cooks up very quickly. nyti.ms/3RnE3yE
item.content:encoded: Chicken piccata is an Italian-American staple beloved for its piquant flavors cradled in a silky, butter-rich pan sauce. It also doesn’t hurt that it cooks up very quickly. nyti.ms/3RnE3yE

item.title: Kids today have lost the fine art of bullshitting a 10 page …
item.author: Amy Mode Activated 🪷 ᓚᘏᗢ ಇ. (@activateamymode.bsky.social)
item.description: Kids today have lost the fine art of bullshitting a 10 page paper from a single Funk & Wagnalls entry or from reading only the CliffsNotes. 🤣
item.content:encoded: Kids today have lost the fine art of bullshitting a 10 page paper from a single Funk & Wagnalls entry or from reading only the CliffsNotes. 🤣

item.title: Poor Roxy got attacked by someone’s asshole dog. Came chargi…
item.author: Stoned Yeti 👽 (@stonedmcyeti.bsky.social)
item.description:
Poor Roxy got attacked by someone’s asshole dog. Came charging at us, but Roxy got in between myself and the other dog, and fucked it up. She is and will
Always be a good girl. 🐶
item.content:encoded:
Poor Roxy got attacked by someone’s asshole dog. Came charging at us, but Roxy got in between myself and the other dog, and fucked it up. She is and will
Always be a good girl. 🐶

item.title: He woke up before sunrise, just like he did every workday. H…
item.author: Alt National Park Service (@altnps.bsky.social)
item.description: He woke up before sunrise, just like he did every workday. His wife made him breakfast. He kissed her goodbye, grabbed his lunch and work boots, patted his dog, and climbed into the white van he used to take his construction crew to work.
item.content:encoded: He woke up before sunrise, just like he did every workday. His wife made him breakfast. He kissed her goodbye, grabbed his lunch and work boots, patted his dog, and climbed into the white van he used to take his construction crew to work.

item.title: Admired for its regal blue lace-like crest and mesmerizing …
item.author: Eloise Powers (@elnopower.bsky.social)
item.description:
Admired for its regal blue lace-like crest and mesmerizing red eyes.

The Victoria Crowned Pigeon, native to New Guinea, is the world's largest living pigeon. Its graceful beauty and deep calls make it one of the region's most remarkable birds.
Scientific Name
Goura victoria

📷 B. Sharma
item.content:encoded:
Admired for its regal blue lace-like crest and mesmerizing red eyes.

The Victoria Crowned Pigeon, native to New Guinea, is the world's largest living pigeon. Its graceful beauty and deep calls make it one of the region's most remarkable birds.
Scientific Name
Goura victoria

📷 B. Sharma

item.title: When Netflix debuts its new adaptation of “Little House on t…
item.author: The Wall Street Journal (@wsj.com)
item.description: When Netflix debuts its new adaptation of “Little House on the Prairie,” countless mothers, daughters, sisters and granddaughters who have turned the series into a multigenerational bonding experience will be watching. 🔗 on.wsj.com/4f2TjIX
item.content:encoded: When Netflix debuts its new adaptation of “Little House on the Prairie,” countless mothers, daughters, sisters and granddaughters who have turned the series into a multigenerational bonding experience will be watching. 🔗 on.wsj.com/4f2TjIX

item.title: “Fiona gave me this video to share,” Zelda Hallman posted al…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
“Fiona gave me this video to share,” Zelda Hallman posted along with a rare message from her friend Fiona Apple.

“She’s been trying to find a truthful way to speak to the enormity of what’s happening in the world, from the horror in Gaza and Sudan, to the cruelty being aimed at trans kids…
item.content:encoded:
“Fiona gave me this video to share,” Zelda Hallman posted along with a rare message from her friend Fiona Apple.

“She’s been trying to find a truthful way to speak to the enormity of what’s happening in the world, from the horror in Gaza and Sudan, to the cruelty being aimed at trans kids…

item.title: Optimists are increasingly arguing AI could offset the effec…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description:
Optimists are increasingly arguing AI could offset the effects of aging populations. But what if the two biggest forces reshaping the labor market make the other harder to manage? Read more: bloom.bg/4vnS658

📷️: SeongJoon Cho/Bloomberg
item.content:encoded:
Optimists are increasingly arguing AI could offset the effects of aging populations. But what if the two biggest forces reshaping the labor market make the other harder to manage? Read more: bloom.bg/4vnS658

📷️: SeongJoon Cho/Bloomberg

item.title: “Mutual grooming does not mean the same thing in all context…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: “Mutual grooming does not mean the same thing in all contexts.” Cat behavioral scientists have found that sometimes cats groom each other specifically to be annoying.
item.content:encoded: “Mutual grooming does not mean the same thing in all contexts.” Cat behavioral scientists have found that sometimes cats groom each other specifically to be annoying.

item.title: Egypt fans being pulled aside, patted down, and double-check…
item.author: Raider (@iwillnotbesilenced.bsky.social)
item.description:
Egypt fans being pulled aside, patted down, and double-checked before the Argentina vs.
Egypt match, while Argentina supporters were allowed to walk through security without the same level of screening. And this is exactly why people keep accusing FIFA of double standards.
item.content:encoded:
Egypt fans being pulled aside, patted down, and double-checked before the Argentina vs.
Egypt match, while Argentina supporters were allowed to walk through security without the same level of screening. And this is exactly why people keep accusing FIFA of double standards.

item.title: The vastness of the Southwest US as photographed in the natu…
item.author: Rodney Thompson (@newmexicogunner.bsky.social)
item.description: The vastness of the Southwest US as photographed in the natural sculpture of sand, rock and sky. The only sound is the wind as you stand alone and dwarfed by this beautiful, magnificent and amazing land in Monument Valley. #BlueSkyArtShow #Quiet
item.content:encoded: The vastness of the Southwest US as photographed in the natural sculpture of sand, rock and sky. The only sound is the wind as you stand alone and dwarfed by this beautiful, magnificent and amazing land in Monument Valley. #BlueSkyArtShow #Quiet

item.title: Lorenzo Salgado Araujo was shot dead by immigration agents w…
item.author: Mother Jones (@motherjones.com)
item.description: Lorenzo Salgado Araujo was shot dead by immigration agents while on his way to work. DHS claims he was using his vehicle as a weapon.
item.content:encoded: Lorenzo Salgado Araujo was shot dead by immigration agents while on his way to work. DHS claims he was using his vehicle as a weapon.

item.title: He really is a charming guy. From his masculinity-defying d…
item.author: Montreal Mike🇨🇦 (@mikemontreal.bsky.social)
item.description:
He really is a charming guy. From his masculinity-defying designer handbags to his goofy sense of humour, he’s a delight.

The whole Norwegian team is just a bunch of very handsome and fun loving chaps who seem to be enjoying every second.
#fifa #Norway

www.cbc.ca/news/world/e...
item.content:encoded:
He really is a charming guy. From his masculinity-defying designer handbags to his goofy sense of humour, he’s a delight.

item.title: Hesai Technology was blacklisted as a national security thre…
item.author: CNBC (@cnbc.com)
item.description: Hesai Technology was blacklisted as a national security threat in 2024 by the U.S. Department of Defense, which designated Hesai as a Chinese military entity.
item.content:encoded: Hesai Technology was blacklisted as a national security threat in 2024 by the U.S. Department of Defense, which designated Hesai as a Chinese military entity.

item.title: I would like to remind everyone saying that it's about time …
item.author: Kuntie Plopkins (@kuntieplopkins.bsky.social)
item.description:
I would like to remind everyone saying that it's about time that England bring it home that we did bring it home in the last 5 years in the women's UEFA cup.
Twice.
Thank you for your attention to this matter
item.content:encoded:
I would like to remind everyone saying that it's about time that England bring it home that we did bring it home in the last 5 years in the women's UEFA cup.
Twice.
Thank you for your attention to this matter
